qa_pairs.task_instruction: I need to slice this whole onion. What sharp tool is resting on the cutting board next to it?
I am ready to start cooking. Which pan on the stove is currently having oil poured into it?
I need to transfer the sliced onions from the board into the hot pan. What utensil is being used to push them?
I need to add a pungent aromatic flavor to the sauce. What small white ingredients are waiting on the cutting board?
The onions are caramelized and I need to deglaze the pan with liquid. What bottle is being poured?
I need to wash my hands after handling food. What orange container is sitting under the tap in the sink?
I need to boil some filtered water. What blue jug is being poured into the kettle?
The pan has stuck-on food residue. What cleaning tool is being used to scrub the inside?
I have roasted vegetables that need to be added to the sauce. What black tray is being tipped over the pan?
